headers.//: Static assets — long-lived immutable caching. Fingerprinted file names guarantee no stale serves.
All HTML / API responses — disallow framing, force HTTPS, lock down referrer + permissions.
HSTS: 2 years, includes sub-domains, eligible for the browser preload list.
Permissions-Policy: deny anything the web dashboard doesn't legitimately need. Cross-check this list whenever a new browser API is introduced.
headers.value: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), interest-cohort=(), browsing-topics=()

headers.//: Disable old Cross-Origin protections holes (Spectre / cross-origin leaks).
Browsers ignore this in modern engines but legacy IE/Edge respect it. Cheap to keep.

CSP — note 'unsafe-inline' on script-src is regrettable but required by the way Vite ships Tailwind + initial hydration. Reduce by moving to nonces if you ever migrate to Next.js. connect-src must allow Supabase API + Realtime (wss).
headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com data:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://api.resend.com https://exp.host; frame-src https://www.openstreetmap.org; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
